description:
A new standalone skill in the prompt-engineering family that drives an iterate -> measure -> rewrite loop to make a prompt's GENERATED CONTENT read more natural/human, using a configurable AI-likeness/naturalness checker as the signal. Origin: user wants to use Originality.ai (an AI-content detector) to iterate a prompt so drafts don't sound like AI.

Design (see spec docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-20-prompt-naturalize-design.md):
- Modular checker behind ONE normalized contract: text -> naturalness score 0-100 (higher = more human) + optional rationale + raw payload. Providers: originality_ai (hosted API, needs key), local_heuristic (free/offline deterministic; also the no-key default fallback), local_model (Ollama / OpenAI-compatible local endpoint as a naturalness rater), fake (offline tests).
- REUSES the existing prompt-engineering-improve deterministic loop machinery (per-round delta, running-best version, continue/stop verdict, trace/report) via a thin "naturalness eval" adapter that emits the same grader/verdict shape; the model only names the weakness + does the rewrite. Every numeric decision stays deterministic.
- Optional regression guard: naturalness-only by default; if the user supplies an existing eval (dataset + criteria), reject any rewrite that lifts naturalness but regresses a guarded criterion past the regression band.
- Cold-start: works from just a prompt + a few sample inputs; no pre-existing eval required.
- Honest framing: optimizes "reads natural", does NOT promise to beat any specific detector; the report names the provider used.

Acceptance:
- New skill skills/prompt-engineering-naturalize/ (SKILL.md + scripts + references) passes python3 tools/skill_lint.py --root .
- Checker contract + each provider unit-tested OFFLINE (originality_ai & local_model against recorded/mocked responses; local_heuristic deterministic; fake trivial); loop integration driven end-to-end by the fake provider with no key/network, asserting deterministic stops + the regression guard fire.
- New test suite registered in AGENTS.md test list.
- No live external API call in tests; no new HTML viewer; one hosted provider only (others are swap-later); local_model is one OpenAI-compatible adapter (no per-vendor SDKs).
- Two independent review rounds addressed; handover + lesson written; ephemeral plan deleted before merge; plugin version bumped after merge.
title: prompt-engineering-naturalize: iterate a prompt so its generated content reads natural (modular AI-likeness checker)
